title: Add runtime enforcement hooks for todo continuation and wisdom accumulation

tasks.title: RESEARCH: Validate experimental.chat.system.transform hook API for context injection
tasks.completed_by: Validated: experimental.chat.system.transform hook exists in SDK v1.1.34. Signature: (input: {sessionID}, output: {system: string[]}) => Promise<void>. Push strings to output.system to inject context. Need to track activeChange.id via tool.execute.after when adv_task_update sets status to in_progress.

tdd_evidence.skip_reason: trivial: research/validation task - no code to test

tasks.title: Add WisdomEntry schema and extend ChangeSchema with optional wisdom array
tasks.completed_by: Added WisdomTypeSchema (pattern/success/failure/gotcha/convention), WisdomEntrySchema with id, type, content (max 2000 chars), source_task, recorded_at. Extended ChangeSchema with optional wisdom array.

tasks.title: Add wisdom operations (add, list) to Store interface and implement in store.ts
tasks.completed_by: Added wisdom.add(changeId, type, content, sourceTask?) and wisdom.list(changeId) to Store interface. Implementation initializes wisdom array if needed, generates ws-{nanoid(6)} IDs, stores in change.json.

tasks.title: Create adv_wisdom_add and adv_wisdom_list tools in new wisdom.ts file
tasks.completed_by: Created plugin/src/tools/wisdom.ts with adv_wisdom_add and adv_wisdom_list tools. Full TDD cycle completed with 10 tests passing.

tasks.title: Register wisdom tools in plugin index.ts
tasks.completed_by: Registered adv_wisdom_add and adv_wisdom_list tools in plugin index.ts. Updated tool count from 28 to 30. Added test for wisdom tools registration.

tdd_evidence.skip_reason: trivial: tool registration with no business logic

tasks.title: Implement todo continuation hook via experimental.chat.system.transform - inject reminder when task done but others remain
tasks.completed_by: Implemented todo continuation reminder using experimental.chat.system.transform. Injects [ADV:TODO_CONTINUATION] when tasks remain.

tasks.title: Implement wisdom injection hook via experimental.chat.system.transform - inject accumulated wisdom when task starts (in_progress)
tasks.completed_by: Implemented wisdom injection using experimental.chat.system.transform. Injects [ADV:ACCUMULATED_WISDOM] when change is active.

tasks.title: Add wisdom recording prompt via experimental.chat.system.transform on task completion
tasks.completed_by: Implemented wisdom recording prompt using experimental.chat.system.transform. Injects [ADV:RECORD_WISDOM] after a task is completed.

tasks.title: Write tests for wisdom storage operations
tasks.completed_by: Implemented comprehensive unit tests for wisdom storage in store.test.ts.

tasks.title: Write tests for todo continuation and wisdom injection hooks
tasks.completed_by: Verified wisdom injection, todo continuation, and wisdom recording prompt hooks in index.test.ts. Verified state tracking for active change and last completed task.

tasks.title: Update ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md with new tools and hook behavior documentation
tasks.completed_by: Updated ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md with new wisdom tools, status markers, and documentation for runtime enforcement behavior.

tasks.title: Add error handling for wisdom operations (invalid changeId, corrupted wisdom data, missing change)
tasks.completed_by: Verified error handling for missing changes and invalid data in store.test.ts.

tasks.title: Add validation for WisdomEntry content (max length 2000 chars, required fields, type enum)
tasks.completed_by: Integrated WisdomEntrySchema.parse() into store.wisdom.add(). Verified max length validation and required fields.

tasks.title: Test backward compatibility: existing changes without wisdom field load and save correctly
tasks.completed_by: Verified that existing changes without 'wisdom' field load correctly and default to empty array.

tasks.title: Add integration test for full wisdom lifecycle: start task -> inject wisdom -> complete task -> prompt recording -> add wisdom
tasks.completed_by: Verified full lifecycle of wisdom and continuation hooks in a combined integration test. verified start -> injection -> complete -> prompt -> add -> accumulated injection.
